name: binaclaw
description: A Binance-focused CLI AI agent inspired by Dexter and Binance Skills.

scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --platform node --target node20 --out-dir dist --clean --splitting --sourcemap
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && node dist/index.js doctor
